publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-11-13 18:30:20 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Office of the Vice Provost

did.abstract: State budget records and other records relating to S.U.N.Y. the Commission on the Future of the Cornell Cooperative Extension Service with Robben Fleming as the chair, the Cornell Commission on Free Speech, and correspondence of James W. Spencer and M.C. Nesheim.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: State budget records and other records relating to S.U.N.Y. the Commission on the Future of the Cornell Cooperative Extension Service with Robben Fleming as the chair, the Cornell Commission on Free Speech, and correspondence of James W. Spencer and M.C. Nesheim.
Includes autobiographical data sheets compiled by Dr. Spencer reflecting on his life, achievements, and influences.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: James W. Spencer Papers, #4-2-2136. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to Boxes 1, 6, 7 and 10 restricted to the permission of the Office of the Vice Provost.

controlaccess.subject: Freedom of speech.
controlaccess.corpname: Cornell University. Commission on Free Speech

unittitle.extref: Link to a partial finding aid.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.

did.unittitle: Series I. James W. Spencer Files
Series II. Vice Provost James W. Spencer Correspondence

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Ag. Ec., Ag. Eng., Agronomy, An. Sci., Education, Food Science
